svg.text: M I S T W O O D — corrupted fey emerge from this tree-line
Round 2: Wenneth Tree-Strides out of a standing stone
LOW STONE WALL — half cover (+2 AC)
vault: 5 ft move or DC 10 Athletics
lantern poles: topple DC 12 STR -> 10ft difficult terrain, or improvised weapon 1d8
T H E H E A R T H
15 villagers + Belva inside — the door & windows are the fey
entry points AND what the party is protecting
the dark Lantern Shrine is on the hill,
far off — not reachable this fight ↗
Low stone wall — half cover, +2 AC.
Vault it: 5 ft move or DC 10 Athletics.
-> 10 ft difficult terrain, or grab as
Tree-Strides out of one in Round 2.
Bright within 10 ft of the door.
R1: 2 pixies thru door, 1 thru window.
R2: Wenneth from a standing stone;
